response.overview: Over the course of three identical days, a man finds himself stuck in a dull, repetitive routine—waking at the same hour, making the same tea, moving through the same empty spaces. The only escape from his solitude comes through the television, where he watches films he loves—but soon, certain scenes begin to speak in his own voice, reflecting his thoughts and longings back to him. As the loop continues, he clings to one purpose: reaching out to a former lover he hasn’t spoken to in years. Each day, he sends a message, hoping for a sign. But as the cycle wears on, the silence begins to speak louder
response.title: هل ستشرق الشمس غدا
